name: Cylinder Chess
author: AGP
description: Standard chess on a board that wraps horizontally: the a-file and h-file are joined into a vertical cylinder, so rooks, bishops, queens and knights can slide or leap off one edge and reappear on the other (ranks do not wrap). All other rules are standard: castling, en passant, pawn double-step and promotion to Q/R/B/N, check, checkmate, stalemate, and the fifty-move / threefold-repetition / insufficient-material draws. White (player 1) moves first.
